adds.rationale: Hyperscaler-nuclear PPAs are the clearest near-term commercial signal for the user's nuclear-SMR thesis this quarter; NLR's mix of uranium miners plus nuclear utilities (Constellation, Vistra, PG&E, Public Service) captures the utility leg that URA (pure miners) misses.

news_evidence.summary: Microsoft signs 20-year PPA with Constellation Energy to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1 to power AI data centers; first major hyperscaler-nuclear deal.
Constellation Energy (CEG) shares jump ~22% on Three Mile Island restart announcement; analysts flag the deal as a template for hyperscaler-utility power agreements.
Vistra Corp (VST) up ~200% YTD as nuclear-exposed utilities re-rate on AI power demand thesis; sector-wide repricing under way.
VanEck Uranium and Nuclear ETF (NLR) AUM nearly triples year-to-date as flows pivot from miners-only baskets to utility-inclusive exposure.

removes.rationale: URA is a pure uranium-miner basket (CCJ, KAP, NXE) and misses the utility re-rating that is now the dominant expression of the nuclear-AI thesis; NLR captures both legs so URA becomes redundant under the cap.

news_evidence.summary: Spot uranium price flat in the mid-$80s/lb through Q3 2024 after Q1 spike, while nuclear-utility equities (CEG, VST) drove most of the sector's gains.
Sprott Physical Uranium Trust premium narrows as fund flows rotate from miners into nuclear-utility names exposed to hyperscaler PPAs.

rationale_overall: One swap at the cap: replace URA (uranium miners only) with NLR (miners + nuclear utilities) to capture the hyperscaler-nuclear PPA inflection that Microsoft-Constellation just made concrete. The remaining watchlist (MSFT, NVDA, ISRG, LLY, ARKX, BOTZ, QTUM, NLR) keeps the same thematic shape — AI (MSFT, NVDA), robotics (ISRG, BOTZ), rockets (ARKX), nuclear (NLR), demographics (LLY), quantum (QTUM) — but the nuclear slot is now aligned with where the wave's commercial signal actually lives this quarter.
